CustomField.label: Home Facility
CustomField.description: VS-20/REQ-053/D-031 facility-scoped sharing. A facility staffer's HOME facility Id. Held as Text (not a Lookup: the User standard object rejects a custom Lookup to VS_Facility__c — "Invalid data type" — so the 18-char VS_Facility__c record Id is stored directly; the Apex only ever reads it as an Id value, never traverses a relationship). VS_FacilityShareService.syncGroupMembership() keeps the user's membership in that facility's public Group (VS_Facility__c.VS_Sharing_Group_Id__c) in sync, granting record-level visibility via managed sharing. District users leave this blank (they use View-All). Admin-managed system field, not PII.
